arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has an opportunity to solve a Manchester United problem Erik ten Hag never did
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's sternest challenge as Man United head coach is right around the corner - and it is one he is likely to relish.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim issues Amad demand and Luke Shaw exit hint
arts.sum: The January transfer window opens in under a month's time, with Manchester United expected to be one of the busier Premier League teams following Ruben Amorim's arrival

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'emerge as Premier League frontrunners' for La Liga star but face competition from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly the Premier League frontrunners to sign Las Palmas attacker Alberto Moleiro but are facing serious competition from the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'hold concrete talks' over move to reunite Ruben Amorim with Sporting star
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly 'hold concrete talks' over a potential move to reunite Ruben Amorim with one of his former Sporting Lisbon players.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man United 'suffer setback' in Leroy Sane race following latest contract update
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United reportedly suffer a setback in the race to sign Bayern Munich's Leroy Sane as update emerges over the player's contract situation.

arts.ttl: Phil Jones reveals the Man United team-mate who 'was always late' for training and meetings - as former Red Devils star claims he 'didn't think it bothered him too much'
arts.sum: The former centre back, who also earned 27 caps for England, won five trophies with United and played alongside several notable players, including the likes of Wayne Rooney and Cristiano Ronaldo.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy ‘disappointed’ and ‘hurt’ after cutting ties with Man Utd
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy returned to United as Erik ten Hag’s assistant in the summer and had a four-game interim spell following his compatriot’s sacking.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits he was left 'HURT' and 'disappointed' by Man United axe, but new Leicester boss explains why he's 'grateful' to Ruben Amorim still
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy, one of the finest forwards in United's history, had taken interim charge following the sacking of Ten Hag, but new boss Ruben Amorim decided he would not be part of his coaching plans.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's email to supporters revealed after controversial ticket price changes
arts.sum: Last week Manchester United announced the decision to raise the price of home tickets to £66 a match - with no concessions for children or pensioners - before angry fan groups protested during the weekend win over Everton

arts.ttl: Man United 'open talks to sign Viktor Gyokeres' in bid to reunite the Sporting Lisbon star with Ruben Amorim - but major hurdle 'stands in their way'
arts.sum: Gyokeres is one of the most in-form and highly sought-after stars in Europe currently, having netted 24 goals in just 21 games so far in all competitions so far this season.
